visual_analysis: The layout is well-organized, with clearly defined sections that enhance readability. The use of contrasting colors and modern typography adds to the visual appeal, although some elements could benefit from more spacing for improved clarity.
educational_analysis: The application clearly presents the key components of digital signatures, but the complexity of the text may not be easily digestible for all learners. The presence of instructional elements is adequate, but more explicit learning objectives could enhance educational effectiveness.
